Uses of Interface
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.statement.IGuard

Packages that use IGuard
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ast.statement
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic
provides a representation for the term structure.
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op
contains the operators of JTerms.

    Method
    Description
    static IGuard
    KeYJavaASTFactory.lessThanArrayLengthGuard(JavaInfo model, ProgramVariable variable, ReferencePrefix array)
    Create a condition that compares a variable and an array length using the less than operator.
    static IGuard
    KeYJavaASTFactory.lessThanGuard(Expression left, Expression right)
    Create a condition that compares two expressions using the less than operator.

    Create a for loop from the loop definition and an arbitrary number of body statements.

    Subinterfaces of IGuard in de.uka.ilkd.key.logic
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    ProgramConstruct
    A type that implement this interface can be used in all java programs instead of an expression or statement.
